Dead Silence (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,574,590Details
International Box Office $4,040,071
Worldwide Box Office $20,614,661
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $18,350,064
Total $18,350,064
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,842,725 (47.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:80.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,805 opening theaters/1,806 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,812,800

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 16th, 2007 (Wide) by Universal
Video Release: June 26th, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for horror violence and images.
Running Time: 90 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Haunting, Living Toys, Murdered Child, Pregnant Women, Revenge, Surprise Twist, Ventriloquism
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
